creator: eborisch+FreeBSD@gmail.com
text:
With the last libpfctl/pftop (0.14 / 0.10_1; both built 11/5 off 56a5011a0f), my little while loop test appears to go on forever (doesn't crash within a few seconds), but I'm still getting significant visual "glitching" (wrong outputs).

Likewise no longer crashing in interactive mode every time I switch to the "rules" view.
